corrections.location: Daniel vii 25, first word on page
corrections.note: Initial β of βασιλεῖς is missing at the page start.
Printed text has κριὸς εἷς; transcription is correct here, no change needed.
Final siglum is Q, not ℵ.
Marginal reading is αἱ ἐξουσίαι; transcript has misdecoded Greek letters as odd sigla/characters.
The article appears to be τῆς in print; accent only.

notes: Body largely matches image. One clear omission at page start. Apparatus has at least one clear siglum error (AQ misread as Aℵ) and one misread Greek phrase in Qmg. Removed no other items; line numbers 25–28 and VIII 1–6 are correctly represented as verse numbers, not marginal line numbers.
